user.title: Set up Hijri Calendar
user.description: Configure language and when the Hijri day changes.

sunset_unavailable.title: Sunset boundary unavailable
sunset_unavailable.description: Home Assistant could not calculate sunset for your location. Reconfigure Hijri Calendar to use local midnight, or set a valid location under Settings → System → General.

calibrate_date.name: Calibrate date
calibrate_date.description: Adjust the integration day offset for today using a small relative change or the announced Hijri date.

offset.name: Offset adjustment
offset.description: Add this many days to the current integration offset (-2 to +2).

hijri.name: Hijri date
hijri.description: Announced Hijri date for today (ISO, e.g. 1446-10-15). Computes and saves the required offset.

language.name: Language
language.description: Language for formatted fields in the response.

date_out_of_range.message: The date is outside the supported Umm al-Qura range.

sunset_unavailable.message: Sunset could not be calculated. Check Home Assistant location settings.

calibrate_no_config_entry.message: Hijri Calendar must be configured before calibrating the date.

calibrate_offset_out_of_range.message: Required offset {offset} is outside the supported range ({min} to {max}).

description.ramadan: The ninth Hijri month of fasting, prayer, and reflection for Muslims.
description.hajj_season: The annual pilgrimage season in Dhul Hijjah, including the days of Hajj rites.
description.hijri_new_year: The first day of Muharram marks the beginning of the Islamic Hijri year.
description.first_day_of_ramadan: The first day of Ramadan when the month of fasting begins.
description.laylat_al_qadr: The Night of Decree, widely observed on the 27th of Ramadan.
description.isra_and_miraj: Commemorates the night journey and ascension, observed on 27 Rajab.
description.last_day_of_ramadan: The final day of Ramadan before Eid al-Fitr.
description.eid_al_fitr_eve: The eve of Eid al-Fitr at the end of Ramadan.
description.eid_al_fitr: Festival marking the end of Ramadan on 1 Shawwal.
description.eid_al_fitr_day_2: The second day of Eid al-Fitr celebrations.
description.eid_al_fitr_day_3: The third day of Eid al-Fitr celebrations.
description.day_of_arafah: The day of standing at Arafah during Hajj on 9 Dhul Hijjah.
description.eid_al_adha: Festival of Sacrifice on 10 Dhul Hijjah.
description.eid_al_adha_day_2: The second day of Eid al-Adha.
description.eid_al_adha_day_3: The third day of Eid al-Adha.
description.eid_al_adha_day_4: The fourth day of Eid al-Adha and the end of the Hajj season rites.
description.ashura: Observed on 10 Muharram, especially significant for fasting and remembrance.

description.hijra: The migration from Mecca to Medina that marks year 1 AH.
description.battle_of_badr: The first major battle between Muslims and Quraysh in 2 AH.
description.battle_of_uhud: A battle fought near Mount Uhud in 3 AH.
description.battle_of_khandaq: The confederates' siege of Medina in 5 AH.
description.treaty_of_hudaybiyyah: A peace agreement between Muslims and Quraysh in 6 AH.
description.conquest_of_khaybar: Muslim campaign against Khaybar fortresses in 7 AH.
description.conquest_of_mecca: The peaceful opening of Mecca in 8 AH.
description.battle_of_hunayn: A battle fought after the conquest of Mecca in 8 AH.
description.battle_of_yarmouk: A decisive battle against Byzantine forces in 15 AH.
description.battle_of_qadisiyyah: A major battle opening Iraq to Muslim forces in 15 AH.
description.conquest_of_jerusalem: The Muslim entry into Jerusalem in 17 AH.
description.conquest_of_egypt: The Muslim expansion into Egypt in 21 AH.
description.fall_of_constantinople: The Ottoman conquest of Constantinople in 857 AH.
